body_txt: Many indigenous people have a tradition of hand to hand combat using traditional weapons. When they're defending their village from an invading tribe or colonial soldiers, of course they're badasses. No matter what era you're in, if you live in the Americas, Oceania, or sub-Saharan Africa, indigenous people will be badasses, whether they're wielding spears, bow and arrows, or hatchets. Rarely seen in the rest of the world, though. The American version of the Badass Native tends to wear Braids, Beads and Buckskins . Will often be magical . Overlaps with Noble Savage and Hollywood Natives , and in more specific contexts with The Savage Indian (in the Americas) or Scary Black Man (in Africa and Australia). See also Proud Warrior Race Guy . Likely to be The Big Guy .
